title: Maximum Number of Non-Overlapping Subarrays With Sum Equals Target
hints: Focus on the prefix sums of the array. A subarray sum equals target if the difference between two prefix sums is target.
Use a hash map to store the most recent index where a specific prefix sum occurred, allowing O(1) lookups for valid subarrays ending at the current position.
Greedy approach: once a valid subarray is found ending at index i, update the last completed end to i and ignore any future matches that start before i to ensure non-overlapping.
